RAYCHEM SCREENED SEPARABLE ELBOW
CONNECTION SYSTEM RSES
FOR INTERFACE B (EN 50180/EN 50181): 400 A, UP TO 36 kV
KEY FEATURES TE Connectivity’s (TE) Raychem Screened Separable Elbow connection
system, RSES are the latest addition to our comprehensive portfolio of
• Hybrid material design:
separable connectors. TE’s RSES are designed to connect polymeric cables
Flexible silicone cable
to medium voltage gas insulated switchgears, transformers or motors which
adapter and rugged EPDM
are using bushings type “B” according to EN 50180/EN 50181 specifi ed
body
for 400 A continuous current. The RSES connectors are compliant with
CENELEC HD 629.1 S2 02/2006+A1:2008.
• Reliable operation even
under harsh environmental
The NEW Hybrid RSES combines all the benefi ts of EPDM’s long service
conditions
life with silicone rubber’s ease of installation characteristics for an
overall superior product solution. The durable EPDM insulation body
• Easy installation due to
provides reliable performance indoors and outdoors, especially in harsh
fl exible silicone cable
environmental conditions. Plus, its rugged, high performance capabilities
adapter
enable easy handling during push-on and connection procedures. In
• Screened connector addition, the fl exible silicone stress cone adapter ensures fast and easy
body for improved safety installations even on larger cable cross sections.
and protection against
A capacitive Voltage Detection (VD) point is built into every connector,
accidental contact
which detects the presence of voltage in a cable network and thus helps
• Easily accessible capacitve avoid possible injury during operation and maintenance.
test point for Voltage
Detection System (VDS)
• Shield-break design for
cable outer sheath testing
without disconnection of
Customers can count on consistent, high quality products, driven by TE’s
RSES
proven innovation and backed by our extraordinary customer support.
ENERGY/// RAYCHEM SCREENED SEPARABLE ELBOW CONNECTION SYSTEM RSES

images.context_text: RAYCHEM SCREENED SEPARABLE ELBOW CONNECTION SYSTEM RSES FOR INTERFACE B (EN 50180/EN 50181): 400 A, UP TO 36 kV KEY FEATURES TE Connectivity’s (TE) Raychem Screened Separable Elbow connection system, RSES are the latest addition to our comprehensive portfolio of • Hybrid material design: separable connectors. TE’s RSES are designed to connect polymeric cables Flexible silicone cable to medium voltage gas insulated switchgears, transformers or motors which adapter and rugged EPDM are using bushings type “B” according to EN 50180/EN 50181 specifi ed body for 400 A continuous current. The RSES connectors are compliant with CENELEC HD 629.1 S2 02/2006+A1:2008. • Reliable operation even under harsh environmental The NEW Hybrid RSES combines all the benefi ts of EPDM’s long service conditions life with silicone rubber’s ease of installation characteristics for an overall superior product solution. The durable EPDM insulation body • Easy installation due to provides reliable performance indoors and outdoors, especially in harsh fl exible silicone cable environmental conditions. Plus, its rugged, high performance capabilities adapter enable easy handling during push-on and connection procedures. In • Screened connector addition, the fl exible silicone stress cone adapter ensures fast and easy body for improved safety installations even on larger cable cross sections. and protection against A capacitive Voltage Detection (VD) point is built into every connector, accidental contact which detects the presence of voltage in a cable network and thus helps • Easily accessible capacitve avoid possible injury during operation and maintenance. test point for Voltage Detection System (VDS) • Shield-break design for cable outer sheath testing without disconnection of Customers can count on consistent, high quality products, driven by TE’s RSES proven innovation and backed by our extraordinary customer support. ENERGY/// RAYCHEM SCREENED SEPARABLE ELBOW CONNECTION SYSTEM RSES

pages.text:
Separable Elbow Connection System RSES
TE´s RSES separable connectors meet CENELEC HD 629.1 S2 requirements and pass a
100% routine test procedure including: AC Voltage Withstand and Partial Discharge Test.
TECHNICAL DATA 215 mm
125 mm
Diameter over insulation 24,5 - 39.6 mm
Conductor cross section Range 50 - 300 mm2
Maximum system voltage 36 kV
82 mm
Continuous current rating 400 A
Basic impulse level 194 kV
Partial Discharge at 2 U0 < 2 pC 270 mm max.ø90 mm*
AC Voltage Withstand (5 min) 85,5 kV
DC voltage withstand (15 min) 114 kV
Thermal short circuit (1 sec) 18 kA
PRODUCT SELECTION INFORMATION *Note:
Plastic insulated cable
36 kV
Conductor cross section (mm2) 240 mm2
Diameter over
Product designation* at cable rated voltage
insulation (mm)
24 kV 36 kV
RSES-645A - 50 - 95 24,5 - 32
RSES-645B 120 - 240 95 - 120 24,5 - 32
RSES-645C - 150 - 240 30,8 - 39,6
RSES-645D 185 - 300 185 - 300 30,8 - 39,6
* For use with cables, other than copper wire screened cable, please contact us.
